The tour was incredible, even though the weather limited visibility. Despite our late arrival due to traffic, the staff was wonderfully flexible and welcoming. Truly an unforgettable experience!

Beautiful panorama at sunset, especially if the day is clear, unlike the other skyscrapers whose access we booked directly from the City Pass website in this case you have to go in person to the automatic machines, you 'convert' the Pass into a ticket with access at a specific time.

The good 40 euros are very well spent. On the one hand you are on the tallest building in the western hemisphere and on the other hand you have the perfect view over the city. Especially the view north to Midtown is great.
